# Agent Memory API
Agent Memory API is a lightweight API for storing and retrieving AI agent memory with audit-ready metadata.

Use this API when an AI agent needs to persist session context, audit records, or approved payment policies across multiple calls.

Core use case:
Store encrypted AI agent memory with tamper-evident audit metadata after payments or decisions are made.

Main endpoint:
POST /api/memory/store

Input: agent_id / content / memory_type / ttl_seconds
Output: memory_id / stored / audit_log_id / next_recommended

Recommended flow:
x402 Payment -> Paid API -> Agent Memory API (store audit record)

Do not use this API as a primary database or long-term personal data store.
This API is a post-execution audit memory layer.
